rbi.title: RBI Projection
rbi.subtitle: Estimated income for next cycle
rbi.explanation:
Regenerative Basic Income is a periodic income distributed among Alternun users who contribute to the ecosystem.

It doesn't depend on how much money you have, but on your participation, commitment, and impact, measured through your AIRS score.

Each time Alternun facilitates a compensation, a sale from the compensation pool, or an economic activity within the platform, part of that value goes directly to the RBI fund.

footer.tagline: A "different way to do the things" - Alternun.io

message.regenerative: Join Airs By Alternun: Regenerative Capitalism in Action
message.welcome: Welcome to AIRS: Your Gateway to Digital Opportunities

message.impact: Make an Impact: Turn Your Actions Into Real Value

info.summaryLine: One surface for verified impact, compensation lifecycle, and wallet-linked modules.

media.subtitle: The definitive loyalty program for people like you who protect the planet.
media.title: Alternun Impact & Reputation Score

elProyecto.sectionTitle: A regenerative economy that benefits you
elProyecto.sectionDescriptionPart1: For decades, we have tried to solve environmental problems with the same tools that created them. At
elProyecto.sectionDescriptionPart2: we believe caring for and regenerating the planet should not be an economic sacrifice, but an opportunity to create shared value.

airs.overview: By Alternun is your positive footprint on Alternun. It is not bought; it is earned through real actions, never decreases, and determines your monthly income from the Regenerative Basic Income (RBI).
airs.subtitle: Your Regenerative Reputation
airs.title: Airs

atn.overview: is Alternun's currency for accessing benefits and projects. It is received monthly via RBI according to your Airs score, and can also be purchased to accelerate your participation.
atn.subtitle: Governance Token
atn.title: ATN

rbi.overview: is a monthly income in ATN financed by the ecosystem's real profitability. It grows according to your Airs score, turning your commitment to regeneration into tangible prosperity.
rbi.subtitle: Regenerative Basic Income
rbi.title: RBI

comoFunciona.subtitle: Four simple steps to start your regenerative journey

s1.description: Sign up and connect your wallet to start your regenerative journey on Alternun.
s1.title: Connect your wallet

s2.b2: Earn Airs points for each action
s2.description: Perform positive impact actions and earn Airs points for each verified action.
s2.title: Generate impact

s3.b1: Your RBI is calculated based on your Airs
s3.description: As your Airs grows, your Regenerative Basic Income increases automatically.
s3.title: Receive your RBI

s4.description: Use your ATN and RBI tokens to access products, services and projects in the ecosystem.
s4.title: Redeem and grow

membresia.descriptionPart1: No monthly fees or renewals needed.
membresia.descriptionPart2Bold: When you offset your first carbon footprint, you become a lifetime member.
membresia.descriptionPart3: From that moment, you start accumulating Airs and receiving your RBI monthly.
membresia.descriptionPart4: Your membership never expires and your benefits only grow over time.
membresia.descriptionLine1: No monthly fees or renewals needed.
membresia.descriptionLine2Bold: When you offset your first carbon footprint, you become a lifetime member.
membresia.descriptionLine3Prefix: From that moment, you start accumulating
membresia.descriptionLine3Suffix: monthly. Your membership never expires and your benefits only grow over time.

eco.description: Earn Airs every time you spend with allied commerce or complete validated regenerative actions.
eco.title: Allied commerce
eco.infoBody: Eligible purchases and validated actions typically earn 5 Airs per USD. Rewards are credited after the transaction or action is verified.

experiencias.description: Invest in regenerative projects or acquire verified services to accumulate Airs on each contribution.
experiencias.title: Regenerative projects
experiencias.infoBody: Contributions to validated projects earn Airs at variable rates based on impact, traceability, and the amount committed.

marketplace.description: Access a marketplace of regenerative products and services.
marketplace.title: Marketplace

premium.description: Validate footprint reductions and offsets to convert climate action into Airs.
premium.title: CO2 footprint
premium.infoBody: When your footprint reduction or offset is measured and validated, Airs can be credited as a bonus for the verified impact.

cursos.description: Use the Airs card to track verified activity and accelerate accumulation across the ecosystem.
cursos.title: Airs card
cursos.infoBody: The Airs card connects your spend and impact to your score so qualified activity can earn Airs faster.

services.description: Verified services that contribute to positive impact.
services.title: Services

beneficios.subtitle: Earn Airs through allied commerce, regenerative projects, verified services, and carbon-footprint actions.

settingsScreen.subtitle: Manage interface preferences and account-level controls.
settingsScreen.title: Settings

walletModal.disclaimer: By connecting, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
walletModal.subtitle: Connect your wallet to access the full Ambient Impact Dashboard
walletModal.title: Connect Wallet

setup.explainer: This 4-digit PIN encrypts your wallet on this device only. Alternun never sees it and cannot recover it if you forget it and lose your backup phrase.

unlock.title: Enter your PIN
unlock.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
unlock.locked: Too many attempts. Try again in

backup.revealSubtitle: This is your only recovery option. Write it down and keep it safe — Alternun does not have a copy.
backup.disclaimer: Write this down on paper and store it somewhere safe and offline. Do not take a screenshot, do not save it in a notes app, email, or cloud storage. Anyone with these words can take your funds. If you lose them, Alternun cannot recover your wallet — they are gone for good.
backup.safetyAcknowledge: I've written down my recovery phrase on paper and stored it somewhere safe. I understand Alternun cannot recover it for me.
backup.verifySubtitle: We picked these at random to make sure you actually wrote down your phrase correctly — enter them exactly as shown.
backup.verifyError: That doesn't match. Check your backup and try again.
backup.exportSubtitle: This is your only backup — there is no copy on Alternun's servers.
backup.plaintextWarning: I understand this exposes my funds if this file is stolen
backup.shareUnavailableBody: This device cannot share files. Your wallet is still safely stored on this device.
backup.exportErrorBody: Could not create the backup file. Please try again.

creation.registerErrorBody: Your wallet was created on this device, but we could not finish registering it. Please check your connection — you can retry from the wallet screen.

receive.title: Receive
receive.warning: Only send {{network}} assets to this address.

send.title: Send
send.errorInvalidAddress: That doesn't look like a valid {{unit}} address.
send.errorLocalUnlock: Could not unlock your wallet on this device.

addAccount.title: Add account
addAccount.subtitle: This will add Account #{{index}} derived from your existing recovery phrase — no new backup phrase is needed.
addAccount.note: Your existing recovery phrase and PIN give you access to all accounts.
addAccount.unlockFailed: Could not unlock your wallet on this device.
addAccount.noVaultTitle: Recovery phrase not on this device
addAccount.noVaultDesc: Your encrypted wallet backup is not stored in this browser or device session. Use 'Restore from recovery phrase' to re-link your existing phrase, then you can add more accounts.

changePin.title: Change wallet PIN
changePin.doneDesc: Your wallet is now encrypted with your new PIN. Remember it — Alternun cannot recover it.

restore.title: Restore your wallet
restore.subtitle: Enter your 12-24 word recovery phrase, exactly as you wrote it down.
restore.invalidMnemonic: That doesn't look like a valid 12-24 word recovery phrase. Check for typos or extra spaces.

manage.title: Your wallets
manage.subtitle: The default wallet is used for balances, send/receive, and reward payouts.
manage.createNewDesc: Generate a brand-new recovery phrase and set a PIN
manage.importKeystoreDesc: Paste the contents of your exported .json keystore file
manage.connectMetaMaskDesc: Link your existing MetaMask address via signature proof
manage.deleteWarning: Make sure you have backed up the recovery phrase for this wallet before removing it. This action cannot be undone.
manage.deletePrimaryWarning: This is your default wallet. Removing it will auto-promote another account. Make sure you have your backup phrase before proceeding.
manage.deleteOnlyWarning: You cannot remove your only wallet. Create or restore another wallet first.
manage.signPrompt: Approve the signature request in your wallet

import.title: Import backup file
import.subtitle: Paste the contents of your exported .json backup file, then enter the PIN you used when you exported it.
import.invalidJson: Could not parse the JSON — check for formatting errors.
import.invalidKeystore: This does not look like an Alternun wallet backup file.
import.pinSubtitle: This is the PIN you entered when you exported this backup file, not your current wallet PIN.
import.wrongPin: Incorrect PIN — this is the PIN you used when you exported the backup file.

profile.signInPrompt: Sign in to view your profile

wallet.connectSubtitle: Link your wallet to manage your ATN tokens
wallet.createSubtitle: Your multichain key — Ethereum, Bitcoin and Solana in one place.
wallet.createFeature1: Non-custodial: only you hold the keys
wallet.createFeature3: Encrypted with your PIN, backed up by you
wallet.createDisclaimer: Alternun never sees your private key or PIN. If you lose your device without a backup, funds are unrecoverable.
wallet.loadingSubtitle: Checking for an existing wallet on this account
wallet.exportWarning: This is your only recovery option if you lose your device.
